crown.name: CSK_Module_MultiModbusTCPServer
crown.desc: This is an automatically generated CROWN (description not necessary).

crown.name: CSK_MultiModbusTCPServer
crown.desc: Module to provide ModbusTCP server functionality for multiple instances. Other modules can access its features / settings. + This module provides a UI for all relevant features. + {empty} + Typically the features of this module are used like this (check also main script of this module): + {empty} + **1) Setup the ModbusTCP server configuration** + - Select instance via 'setSelectedInstance'. + - Set interface via 'setServerInterface'. + - Set port via 'setServerPort'. + - Connect to server via 'setStatusOfServer'. + {empty} + **2) Setup register** + It is possible to configure discrete inputs, coils, input register and holding register. Make use the 'addRegister' function. + For each register it is possible to configure an event to register to and to set received values to the variable. + It is possible to set a value via 'setInputValueNUM' (replace NUM by its instance identifier). + If the value of a register changed, it will be notified via the related event, like: OnNewUpdateNUM_TYPE_ADDRESS + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance, TYPE by the type of register and ADDRESS by the used address (e.g. "OnNewUpdate1_COIL_4"). + {empty} +

event.name: OnNewStatusLoadParameterOnReboot
event.desc: Notify status if parameters should be loaded on app/device boot up.

event.name: OnPersistentDataModuleAvailable
event.desc: Notify status if features of CSK_PersistentData module are available.

event.name: OnNewInstanceList
event.desc: Event to provide list of created instances.

event.name: OnNewProcessingParameter
event.desc: Event to share processing parameters to the instances.

param.desc: Number of the instance to receive the parameter.
param.name: objectNo

param.desc: Optional additiona value for the parameter.
param.name: value2

param.desc: Optional additiona value for the parameter.
param.name: value3

param.desc: Optional additiona value for the parameter.
param.name: value4

event.name: OnNewSelectedInstance
event.desc: Notify if new instance is selected.

event.name: OnDataLoadedOnReboot
event.desc: Event to call if module tried to load parameters and should be ready.

event.name: OnNewParameterName
event.desc: Notify name of persistent data parameter.

event.name: OnUserLevelOperatorActive
event.desc: Status of Operator userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnUserLevelMaintenanceActive
event.desc: Status of Maintenance userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnUserLevelServiceActive
event.desc: Status of Service userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnUserLevelAdminActive
event.desc: Status of Admin userlevel. Used internally in combination with the CSK_UserManagement module if available.

event.name: OnNewValueUpdateNUM
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to sync paramters between instance threads and Controller part of module. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnNewValueUpdate1"). +

param.desc: Instance new value is coming from.
param.name: instance

param.desc: Name of the paramter to update/sync.
param.name: parameter

param.desc: Optionally if internal parameter should be used for internal objects.
param.name: valueB

event.name: OnNewValueToForwardNUM
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to forward data from instance thread to Controller part of module, e.g. to forward values to UI. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "OnNewValueToForward1"). +

param.desc: Eventname to use to forward value.
param.name: eventname

event.name: OnNewStatusFlowConfigPriority
event.desc: Notify if FlowConfig should have priority for FlowConfig relevant configurations.

event.name: OnNewStatusCSKStyle
event.desc: Notify UI style to use for CSK modules.

event.name: OnNewStatusModuleVersion
event.desc: Notify version of module.

event.name: OnNewStatusModuleIsActive
event.desc: Notify if module can be used on device.

event.name: OnNewLog
event.desc: Notify latest log messages (max. 200).

event.name: OnNewStatusListOfInputRegisters
event.desc: Notify list of input registers.

event.name: OnNewStatusListOfHoldingRegisters
event.desc: Notify list of holding registers.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempInputRegisterDataType
event.desc: Notify type of data to use for new input resgister.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempHoldingRegisterDataType
event.desc: Notify type of data to use for new holding register.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempInputRegisterEvent
event.desc: Notify status of event to register value of new input register to add.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempHoldingRegisterEvent
event.desc: Notify status of event to register value of new input register to add.

event.name: OnNewUpdateNUM_TYPE_ADDRESS
event.desc: Example of dynamically created event to forward updates of Modbus registers. + NUM will be replaced by the instance identifier, TYPE by the register type and ADDRESS by the related address (e.g. "OnNewUpdate1_COIL_4"). +

param.desc: Updated value (NUMBER for 'INPUT/HOLDING_REGISTER', BOOL for 'DISCRETE_INPUT, COIL')
param.name: value

event.name: OnNewStatusServerActive
event.desc: Notify if server is active.

event.name: OnNewStatusInputRegisterValueToSet
event.desc: Notfiy value to set for input register variable.

event.name: OnNewStatusHoldingRegisterValueToSet
event.desc: Notify value to set for holding register.

event.name: OnNewStatusServerPort
event.desc: Notify port of ModbusTCP server.

event.name: OnNewStatusInterfaceList
event.desc: Notify list of available interfaces.

event.name: OnNewStatusSelectedInterface
event.desc: Notify selected interface.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempDiscreteInputAddress
event.desc: Notify preset address for discrete input to create.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempCoilAddress
event.desc: Notify preset address for coil to add.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempDiscreteInputRegisteredEvent
event.desc: Notify preset event name for discrete input to create.

event.name: OnNewStatusDiscreteInputStatusToSet
event.desc: Notify status of currently selected discrete input.

event.name: OnNewStatusCoilStatusToSet
event.desc: Notify status of selected coil.

event.name: OnNewStatusListOfCoils
event.desc: Notify list of coil status.

event.name: OnNewStatusListOfDiscreteInputs
event.desc: Notify list of discrete inputs and status.

param.desc: List of discrete inputs and status.
param.name: discreteInputList

event.name: OnNewStatusTempInputRegisterAddress
event.desc: Notify preset address for input register to add.

event.name: OnNewStatusTempHoldingRegisterAddress
event.desc: Notify preset address for holding register to add.

event.name: OnNewStatusShowLog
event.desc: Notify status to show WebSocket communication log in UI.

function.name: setParameterName
function.desc: Function to set the name of the parameters if saved/loaded via the CSK_PersistentData module.

function.name: setLoadOnReboot
function.desc: Configure if this module should load its saved parameters at app/ device boot up.

function.name: pageCalled
function.desc: Function to register "OnResume" of the module UI (only as helper function).

return.desc: Empty string (only needed to simplify binding).
return.name: empty

function.name: setSelectedInstance
function.desc: Select one of the multiple instances.

function.name: getInstancesAmount
function.desc: Get the amount of created instances of this module.

function.name: addInstance
function.desc: Function to add an additional instance.

function.name: resetInstances
function.desc: Function to reset instances to one single instance. + IMPORTANT: As instances start their own threads, the module needs to be restarted if new instances are needed... (see AppEngine docu for "Script.startScript").

function.name: sendParameters
function.desc: Send parameters to CSK_PersistentData module if possible to save them.

param.desc: [Optional] Set to TRUE if the data should NOT be saved immediately after sending.
param.name: noDataSave

function.name: setFlowConfigPriority
function.desc: Function to configure if FlowConfig should have priority for FlowConfig relevant configuration.

function.name: clearFlowConfigRelevantConfiguration
function.desc: Function to clear FlowConfig relevant configurations.

function.name: getStatusModuleActive
function.desc: Function to get status if module is active.

function.name: loadParameters
function.desc: Load parameters for this module from the CSK_PersistentData module if possible and use them.

function.name: getParameters
function.desc: Function to get all parameters of the client in JSON format.

param.desc: Number of instance to get parameters from.
param.name: instanceNo

function.name: resetModule
function.desc: Function to reset main configuration of module.

function.name: setStatusOfServer
function.desc: Function to set status of Modbus TCP/IP server.

function.name: addRegister
function.desc: Function to add a new register to Modbus TCP/IP server.

param.desc: Type of Modbus register to use
param.name: regType

param.desc: Name of event to register value.
param.name: eventName

param.desc: Data type (needed for Input and Holding register).
param.name: dataType

param.desc: Optional parameter if event should not be updated if register already exists.
param.name: noEventUpdate

function.name: addInputRegisterViaUI
function.desc: Function to add new input register with preset configuration.

function.name: addHoldingRegisterViaUI
function.desc: Function to add new holding register with preset configuration.

function.name: setInputRegisterAddress
function.desc: Function to preset address of new input register to create.

function.name: setHoldingRegisterAddress
function.desc: Function to preset address of new holding register to create.

function.name: setInputRegisterDataType
function.desc: Function to preset data type of new input register to create.

function.name: setInputRegisterEvent
function.desc: Function to set the event to register the value of the new input register.

function.name: setHoldingRegisterEvent
function.desc: Function to set the event to register the value of the new holding register.

function.name: setInputRegisterTableSelection
function.desc: Function to set selection of input register table.

function.name: removeInputRegisterViaUI
function.desc: Function to remove preselected input register.

function.name: removeHoldingRegisterViaUI
function.desc: Function to remove preselected holding register.

function.name: removeHoldingRegister
function.desc: Function to remove holding register.

param.desc: Address of holding register to remove.
param.name: address

function.name: removeInputRegister
function.desc: Function to remove input register.

param.desc: Address of input register to remove.
param.name: address

function.name: setInputRegisterNUM
function.desc: Function to update value of input register. Example of dynamically created function to set the value of an input register. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "setInputValue1"). +

function.name: setHoldingValueNUM
function.desc: Example of dynamically created function to set the value of a holding register. + NUM will be replaced by the number of instance (e.g. "setHoldingValue1"). +

function.name: setInputRegisterValueViaUI
function.desc: Function to preset a value to set for a selected input register.

function.name: setHoldingRegisterValueViaUI
function.desc: Function to preset a value to set for a selected holding register.

function.name: setHoldingValueViaUI
function.desc: Function to set preconfigured value to selected holding register.

function.name: setServerPort
function.desc: Function to set port of ModbusTCP server.

function.name: setServerInterface
function.desc: Function to set interface of ModbusTCP server.

function.name: setHoldingRegisterDataType
function.desc: Function to preset data type of new holding register to create.

function.name: setHoldingRegisterTableSelection
function.desc: Function to set selection of holding register table.

function.name: setRegisteredEventOfRegister
function.desc: Function to set registered event of specific register.

param.desc: Name of event to register to.
param.name: eventName

param.desc: Data type (needed for regType INPUT_REGISTER and HOLDING_REGISTER.
param.name: dataType

function.name: setDiscreteInputAddress
function.desc: Function to preset address for discrete input to add.

function.name: setCoilAddress
function.desc: Function to preset address for coil to add.

function.name: setDiscreteInputRegisteredEvent
function.desc: Function to preset event to register discrete input to add.

param.desc: Name of event to register discrete input.
param.name: event

function.name: setCoilRegisteredEvent
function.desc: Function to preset event to register coil to add.

param.desc: Name of event to register coil.
param.name: event

function.name: addDiscreteInputViaUI
function.desc: Function to add discrete input with preset configuration.

function.name: addCoilViaUI
function.desc: Function to add preconfigured coil.

function.name: removeDiscreteInput
function.desc: Function to remove discrete input.

param.desc: Address of discrete register to remove.
param.name: address

function.name: removeCoil
function.desc: Function to remove coil.

function.name: removeCoilViaUI
function.desc: Function to remove preselected coil.

function.name: removeDiscreteInputViaUI
function.desc: Function to remove preselected discrete register.

function.name: setDiscreteInputTableSelection
function.desc: Function to set selection of discrete input table.

function.name: setCoilTableSelection
function.desc: Function to set selection of coil table.

function.name: setDiscreteInputStatusViaUI
function.desc: Function to preset a status to set for a selected discrete input.

function.name: setCoilStatusViaUI
function.desc: Function to preset a status to set for a selected coil.

function.name: setShowLog
function.desc: Function to set if communication log should be shown on UI.

crown.name: MultiModbusTCPServer_FC
crown.desc: Crown to provide CSK_FlowConfig relevant features.

function.name: create
function.desc: Internally used CSK_FlowConfig create function.

param.desc: Data type of register (only needed for RegisterType INPUT_REGISTER and HOLDING_REGISTER)
param.name: DataType

return.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
return.name: handle

function.name: updateValue
function.desc: Set value of ModbusTCP register.

param.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
param.name: handle

param.desc:
Source to forward data via ModbusTCP register.
Parameter: 1: Data (BOOL if DISCRETE_INPUT or COIL, NUMBER if HOLDING_REGISTER or INPUT_REGISTER )
param.name: source

crown.name: OnNewData
crown.desc: Provide updated value of ModbusTCP register.

event.name: OnNewData
event.desc: Provide updated value of ModbusTCP register.

param.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
param.name: handle

param.desc:
'CSK_MultiModbusTCPServer.OnNewUpdate[InstanceNUM]_[TYPE]_[ADDRESS]'
Parameter 1: Updated value (NUMBER for 'INPUT/HOLDING_REGISTER', BOOL for 'DISCRETE_INPUT, COIL')
param.name: OnNewData

function.name: create
function.desc: Internally used CSK_FlowConfig create function.

param.desc: Data type of register (only needed for RegisterType INPUT_REGISTER and HOLDING_REGISTER)
param.name: DataType

return.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
return.name: handle

function.name: register
function.desc: Internally used CSK_FlowConfig register function.

param.desc: Handle to internally used FlowConfig instance.
param.name: handle
